/usr/bin/c++ -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/qqmusic-island.dir/link.d "CMakeFiles/qqmusic-island.dir/qqmusic-island_autogen/mocs_compilation.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/qqmusic-island.dir/src/main.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/qqmusic-island.dir/src/mpris_watcher.cpp.o" -o qqmusic-island  /usr/lib/libQt6DBus.so.6.10.2 /usr/lib/libQt6Core.so.6.10.2
